description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical orange body and two wide white horizontal stripes encircling its midsection. The surface shows visible signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, suggesting it has been used outdoors. The tip of the cone is slightly rounded and solid, maintaining the same orange color as the rest of the cone. The base is a broad, square platform, also orange, with a slightly raised edge and a visibly textured, somewhat dirty surface for stability. The cone appears to be made primarily of flexible plastic or rubber, designed to be lightweight yet durable. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the cone.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide white stripes and a broad, square base, showing visible dirt and scuff marks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange cone with two white stripes and a square, slightly dirty base.
description_view_1: Side view with similar features, highlighting more dirt and wear on the base and lower cone.
description_view_2: Another side view, nearly identical to view 1, with visible scuffing and dirt on the base.
description_view_3: Rear view, showing the same orange and white pattern, with pronounced dirt and wear on the base.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide white horizontal stripes encircle the cone, evenly spaced, each approximately one-sixth the height of the cone. The stripes are likely reflective but appear somewhat faded.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is solid, slightly rounded, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is a broad, square platform, orange in color, with a slightly raised edge and visible dirt and scuff marks. It appears thick and stable, likely weighted or reinforced for stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: Worn and dirty, with visible scuff marks, fading, and signs of outdoor use.
